params._amountPayable: The amount of tokens to be paid (driver's pay + fee)
params._cancellationFeePercentageBps: The cancellation fee percentage in basis points
params._consolidatedSignature: The concatenation of the payer's signature and the driver's signature for the ride
params._endCoords: The ending coordinates of the ride
params._feePercentageBps: The fee percentage in basis points
params._messageHash: The hash of the message to be signed by the payer and driver
params._packagedData: Concatenation of the transaction deadline, and the payer's permit signature
params._startCoords: The starting coordinates of the ride

isTrustedForwarder(address).details: Indicates whether any particular address is the trusted forwarder.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

trustedForwarder().details: Returns the address of the trusted forwarder.

allRides(uint256).notice: Returns the address of a ride by index.

allRidesLength().notice: Returns the total number of rides deployed.
